## What

<!-- What you'd like Timinute to do that it doesn't today. One paragraph. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem this solves or the workflow it improves. Skip if obvious. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds that exist today, or other approaches you thought about. -->
